message:
fix(rpc): check total pending count instead of per-queue length for overflow

push_steering() and push_follow_up() previously checked only their own
queue length against MAX_RPC_PENDING_MESSAGES. This meant if the
steering queue had 99 messages and the follow-up queue had 99, both
would accept one more — allowing 2x the intended maximum total pending
messages.

Replace self.steering.len() and self.follow_up.len() with
self.pending_count() (which sums both queues) so the cap applies to
the total across both queues.

Tests (+36 lines):
- shared_state_blocks_follow_up_when_steering_queue_reaches_total_cap
- shared_state_blocks_steering_when_follow_up_queue_reaches_total_cap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
